name: stock-scenario-story
description: Research and narrate a sourced, numbers-free market story after a validated quant handoff.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-grounded stories after a quant handoff
interface.longDescription: Validate a Quant Stock Technical result, research point-in-time company and market evidence, and narrate a sourced, numbers-free scenario story.
defaultPrompt: Turn this validated quant result into a sourced scenario story.
Research the strongest evidence for and against this market narrative.
